const q=query(collection(db,"messages"),orderBy("timestamp"));const unsubscribe=onSnapshot(q,snapshot=>{const messages=snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));setMessages(messages);});return()=>unsubscribe();}},[user]);useEffect(()=>{// Listen for incoming messages
